mdtools.failure_summary: The mdtools-only run reached the 30-turn cap and produced heading_tree, block_order, and block_text mismatches; the final structure omitted the expected Getting Started sibling relationship around First Build.

hybrid.success_summary: The hybrid run completed the subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement.

unix.failure_summary: The unix run reached the 30-turn cap with the real Installation subsection still under Getting Started after First Build; both scorers reported heading_tree, block_order, and block_text mismatches.

notes: The raw headline cell is positive because hybrid passed while unix failed, but the unix-adversary retry labeled the gap `planning`, not AST-structural.
The mdtools-only seed failed, so the family also lacks the mdtools PASS evidence required by the promotion gate.
